sections.paragraph: to spice or season, used in the sense-(a) to embalm corpses, Gen 50:2, Gen 50:3, 26 Gen 50:26 (حنط I. II. id.).-(b) poet. the fig spices, i.e. fills its fruit with aromatic juice, to mature, Son 2:13. [“Arabic حنط to mature (fodder for camels), etc.” See Thes.] Hence חֲנֻטִים [“also חִטָּה, חִנְטִין”].
